GenAiPlugin.description: This topic creates a fictional relationship summary for demonstration purposes.

genAiPluginInstructions.description: Do not include any real or personal information in the summary.
Ensure the summary is clear, concise, and relevant to the demo's context.
Focus on creating a narrative that aligns with the intended use case of the demo.
Generate a fictional relationship summary tailored for a demo scenario.

GenAiPlugin.scope: Your job is only to generate a fictional relationship summary, ensuring it is suitable for demo scenarios and does not include real or sensitive information.
